d1e1_a.speaker: Mentor
d1e1_a.text: Welcome to your first day! A customer just walked in looking lost. What do you do?

choices.text: Greet them warmly and ask what they need
Wait for them to approach you
Ignore them and keep doing paperwork

d1e1_c_good.speaker: Customer
d1e1_c_good.text: Oh how lovely! I was looking for a gift. You have great service!

d1e1_c_neutral.speaker: Customer
d1e1_c_neutral.text: Uh... hi. Do you sell gift items? You seem busy so I will be quick.

d1e1_c_bad.speaker: Customer
d1e1_c_bad.text: Excuse me? Hello? Fine, I will take my business elsewhere.

d1e1_result_good.speaker: Mentor
d1e1_result_good.text: Great instinct! First impressions build lasting customer relationships. Reputation up!

d1e1_result_neutral.speaker: Mentor
d1e1_result_neutral.text: Not bad, but proactive service goes a long way. You missed a chance to shine.

d1e1_result_bad.speaker: Mentor
d1e1_result_bad.text: You just lost a customer. In business, every person who walks in is an opportunity.

d1r_rush_hour.speaker: Mentor
d1r_rush_hour.text: Unexpected rush hour! A crowd just walked in all at once. How do you handle the sudden surge?

d1r_rush_b.speaker: You
d1r_rush_b.text: The shop is suddenly packed. Orders are piling up and the team is looking at me for direction.

choices.text: Jump in and help the team directly
Assign roles clearly and coordinate
Apologize to customers for wait time
Temporarily limit orders to manage quality

d1r_rush_c_help.speaker: Staff
d1r_rush_c_help.text: Having you in the trenches with us means everything. We pushed through and every customer was served!

d1r_rush_c_coordinate.speaker: Staff
d1r_rush_c_coordinate.text: Clear roles made the chaos manageable. We worked like a machine. That kind of leadership under pressure is rare.

d1r_rush_c_apologize.speaker: Customer
d1r_rush_c_apologize.text: We appreciate the heads up on the wait. Honest communication goes a long way. We will be back!

d1r_rush_c_limit.speaker: Customer
d1r_rush_c_limit.text: I respect that you prioritize quality over quantity. That is rare and it makes me trust this place more.

d1r_rush_result_help.speaker: Mentor
d1r_rush_result_help.text: Leading from the front builds team respect that no speech ever could. Your willingness to get your hands dirty sets the culture.

d1r_rush_result_coordinate.speaker: Mentor
d1r_rush_result_coordinate.text: Operational leadership under pressure is a rare skill. Clear role assignment turns chaos into coordinated action instantly.

d1r_rush_result_apologize.speaker: Mentor
d1r_rush_result_apologize.text: Proactive communication during service disruption preserves customer goodwill. People forgive waits they were warned about.

d1r_rush_result_limit.speaker: Mentor
d1r_rush_result_limit.text: Quality over quantity is a brand positioning decision. Customers who value quality will respect it. Those who do not were never your core audience.

d1r_wrong_order.speaker: Customer
d1r_wrong_order.text: Excuse me, this is not what I ordered. I specifically asked for no sugar and this is clearly sweetened. I am not happy about this.

d1r_wrong_b.speaker: You
d1r_wrong_b.text: A mistake was made on the order. The customer is visibly frustrated and other customers are watching to see how I handle this.

choices.text: Apologize and remake immediately at no charge
Apologize sincerely and offer a full refund
Apologize and give them a discount on next visit
Politely question if they ordered correctly

d1r_wrong_c_remake.speaker: Customer
d1r_wrong_c_remake.text: Thank you for fixing it immediately. Mistakes happen but how you handle them is what matters. I am impressed.

d1r_wrong_c_refund.speaker: Customer
d1r_wrong_c_refund.text: A full refund is more than I expected. That is genuine customer care. I will definitely return and bring friends.

d1r_wrong_c_discount.speaker: Customer
d1r_wrong_c_discount.text: A next visit discount is okay I suppose. Still a bit inconvenient today but I appreciate the gesture.

d1r_wrong_c_question.speaker: Customer
d1r_wrong_c_question.text: Are you seriously suggesting I made the mistake?! I am never coming back here. This is unacceptable.

d1r_wrong_result_remake.speaker: Mentor
d1r_wrong_result_remake.text: Service recovery done right turns mistakes into loyalty moments. A customer who watches you handle errors well trusts you more than one who never saw a problem.

d1r_wrong_result_refund.speaker: Mentor
d1r_wrong_result_refund.text: Generous service recovery costs money but earns loyalty that pays back multiple times over. The lifetime value of a retained customer far exceeds the refund.

d1r_wrong_result_discount.speaker: Mentor
d1r_wrong_result_discount.text: Deferred compensation for a current problem often feels inadequate to the customer. When possible resolve the issue immediately rather than postponing the remedy.

d1r_wrong_result_question.speaker: Mentor
d1r_wrong_result_question.text: Blaming customers for service failures is one of the fastest ways to destroy reputation. Even if they were wrong the approach must always be gracious.

d1r_kind_stranger.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_stranger.text: Hi, I do not need anything today. I just wanted to say this place has a wonderful energy. You should be proud of what you are building here.

d1r_kind_b.speaker: You
d1r_kind_b.text: A stranger just came in to offer encouragement with no expectation of anything in return. How do I respond?

choices.text: Thank them warmly and offer something on the house
Thank them genuinely and ask what brought them in
Thank them and share your story briefly
Thank them briefly and get back to work

d1r_kind_c_gift.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_c_gift.text: Oh! I really did not expect anything. This is so kind. I will be telling everyone about this place. You just made my whole day.

d1r_kind_c_ask.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_c_ask.text: I walked past and felt pulled in by the warmth of this place. That kind of atmosphere is rare and it is entirely your doing.

d1r_kind_c_share.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_c_share.text: I love hearing origin stories. Yours is genuinely inspiring. People need to know about this place. Can I share it on my social media?

d1r_kind_c_brief.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_c_brief.text: Of course, you are busy. Keep up the great work. This place deserves to thrive.

d1r_kind_result_gift.speaker: Mentor
d1r_kind_result_gift.text: Responding to kindness with generosity creates powerful word of mouth. You turned a brief encounter into a brand ambassador.

d1r_kind_result_ask.speaker: Mentor
d1r_kind_result_ask.text: Curiosity about people builds genuine community connections. Understanding why people are drawn to your business helps you amplify what makes it special.

d1r_kind_result_share.speaker: Mentor
d1r_kind_result_share.text: Authentic stories travel further than any advertisement. Organic advocacy from genuine encounters is the most credible marketing that exists.

d1r_kind_result_brief.speaker: Mentor
d1r_kind_result_brief.text: Efficiency is important but moments of human connection have compounding business value. Sometimes the most productive thing you can do is slow down briefly.

d1e2_a.speaker: Mentor
d1e2_a.text: Your supplier just called. They are offering a bulk discount on stock but it requires a big upfront payment. What do you do?

d1e2_b.speaker: You
d1e2_b.text: A bulk deal sounds good but that is a lot of cash upfront...

choices.text: Take the bulk deal — more stock, better margins
Order just enough for now — play it safe
Skip the order entirely — save the cash

d1e2_c_bulk.speaker: Supplier
d1e2_c_bulk.text: Excellent choice! Your shelves will be full and customers love a well stocked shop.

d1e2_c_safe.speaker: Supplier
d1e2_c_safe.text: Alright, small order coming your way. Should arrive tomorrow morning.

d1e2_c_skip.speaker: Supplier
d1e2_c_skip.text: Your call. But if you run out of stock do not blame me when customers walk out empty handed.

d1e2_result_bulk.speaker: Mentor
d1e2_result_bulk.text: Bold move! Cash flow took a hit but a fully stocked shop signals confidence to customers.

d1e2_result_safe.speaker: Mentor
d1e2_result_safe.text: Cautious but reasonable. Managing cash flow carefully is a real skill in business.

d1e2_result_skip.speaker: Mentor
d1e2_result_skip.text: Saving cash is tempting but empty shelves drive customers away. Balance is key.

d1e3_a.speaker: Mentor
d1e3_a.text: End of your first day! A regular customer wants a discount on their usual order. How do you handle it?

d1e3_b.speaker: Customer
d1e3_b.text: Hey, I come here every week. Any chance of a little loyalty discount?

choices.text: Offer a 10% loyalty discount
Politely decline but thank them for loyalty
Offer a free small item instead
Refuse and say prices are fixed

d1e3_c_discount.speaker: Customer
d1e3_c_discount.text: Really? Thank you so much! I will definitely keep coming back and tell my friends!

d1e3_c_decline.speaker: Customer
d1e3_c_decline.text: Oh, no worries. I appreciate you being honest about it. See you next week!

d1e3_c_gift.speaker: Customer
d1e3_c_gift.text: Oh wow, that is so thoughtful! You really care about your customers. Love this place!

d1e3_c_refuse.speaker: Customer
d1e3_c_refuse.text: Right... prices are fixed. Got it. Maybe I will look around for other options.

d1e3_result_discount.speaker: Mentor
d1e3_result_discount.text: Loyalty programs work! You took a small hit on money but gained a brand ambassador.

d1e3_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d1e3_result_decline.text: Honest and respectful. Not every loyalty ask needs a yes — how you say no matters too.

d1e3_result_gift.speaker: Mentor
d1e3_result_gift.text: Creative solution! A small gesture can mean more than a discount and costs less too.

d1e3_result_refuse.speaker: Mentor
d1e3_result_refuse.text: Rigid pricing without warmth pushes loyal customers away. Flexibility builds relationships.
